figures.title: Equilibrium analysis in a multi-agent reinsurance chain
figures.caption: Fig. 1 The reinsurance chain of m insurers and n reinsurers — This diagram illustrates a reinsurance chain structure with two layers: m insurers (shown in yellow ovals on the left) and n reinsurers (shown in blue ovals on the right). The insurers are connected to the reinsurance layer, which forms a sequential chain where each reinsurer passes risk to the next reinsurer in the chain, with bidirectional arrows indicating two-way interactions between consecutive reinsurers. figures.title: Existence of $q$-Bass martingales in the semidiscrete setting

The left panel (a) shows an irreducible pair of measures (μ,ν) where ν dominates μ in convex order, with the red curve lying above the blue curve throughout.
